hmong.sr_assessed: Tus coach cov lus tawm tswvyim npaj txhij hauv qab lub builder panel
hmong.recall_needs_more: Ua ntej ntxiv tsawg kawg 4 lub tswvyim rau 2 pab
hmong.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: txhua lub tswvyim poob rau hauv lub tray. Muab txhua lub rov tso rau qhov chaw uas nws yuav tsum nyob.
hmong.sr_recall_complete: Koj rov tsim koj lub ntiaj teb tag nrho los ntawm kev nco!
hmong.snapshot_failed: Ntes tsis tau 3D view ntawm no.
hmong.print_saved: Download one-pager lawm — qhib thiab luam tawm
hmong.import_replaces: Qhov no yuav hloov koj daim composition tam sim no.
hmong.title: Cov Duab Ywj Pheej
hmong.tagline: Tsim koj tus kheej lub Ntiaj Teb ntawm Cov Duab: xaiv ib qho archetypal structure, ntim nrog KOJ cov tswvyim, teeb tsa hauv 3D, thiab txaug qhov tseem ceeb.
hmong.tagline2: Ntawm no koj yog tus sau — AI tsuas coach xwb, thiab tsuas thaum koj thov xwb.
hmong.keep_content_hint: Koj cov pab thiab tswvyim tseem nyob — xaiv ib daim form tsuas hloov lub duab ntawm qhov chaw xwb.
hmong.recall_title: Recall: rov tsim koj lub ntiaj teb
hmong.snapshot_tip: Khaws ib daim duab ntawm koj lub 3D ntiaj teb
hmong.print_tip: Download ib daim one-pager luam tau (snapshot + koj cov tswvyim + coach cov lus)
hmong.recall_tip: Koj cov tswvyim poob rau hauv tray — muab rov tso los ntawm kev nco
hmong.assess_needs_items: Ua ntej ntxiv tsawg kawg 3 lub tswvyim
hmong.assess_tip: Thov tus AI coach saib koj daim composition tag nrho
hmong.recall_heading: Rov tsim los ntawm kev nco
hmong.recall_instructions: Txhua lub tswvyim poob ntawm lawv qhov chaw mus rau hauv lub tray hauv qab. Xaiv ib lub tswvyim hauv qhov chaw, ces siv cov group chip (los yog cov yuam sij [ thiab ]) los xa nws mus tsev. Tsis muaj dab tsi raug khaws thaum ua si.
hmong.recall_complete: koj rov tsim koj lub ntiaj teb tag nrho!
hmong.recall_hint: Lus qhia rau lub tswvyim uas xaiv
hmong.title_placeholder: Lub ntiaj teb no hais txog dab tsi?
hmong.note_label: Sau rau koj tus kheej (tshwm hauv 3D)
hmong.note_placeholder: Vim li cas lub tswvyim no nyob ntawm no?
hmong.no_3d: Load tsis tau 3D qhov chaw ntawm no — koj lub builder panel tseem ua haujlwm, thiab txhua yam koj sau raug khaws cia.
hmong.stage_hint: Hauv qhov chaw: rub ib lub tswvyim los tso nws · rub lub keeb los ncig · scroll los zoom · [ thiab ] txav ib lub tswvyim uas xaiv ntawm ib pab mus rau lwm pab.
hmong.questions: Cov lus nug los xav txog
hmong.suggestions: Cov kauj ruam tsim tom ntej
